checks.name: raw_input_required_check
checks.message: Raw input 文件存在: mixed-feedback.csv, mixed-feedback.txt, mixed-feedback.md

checks.name: raw_input_schema_check
checks.message: Raw input 不包含禁止结构化字段

checks.name: raw_input_realism_check
checks.message: Raw input 真实性特征较少 (2/4): 短句30条, 来源9个, 重复率0%
checks.recommendation: 建议增加更多短句反馈、转述反馈、重复反馈和噪声反馈

checks.name: raw_to_normalized_trace_check
checks.message: 所有 124 条 normalized feedback 可追溯到 raw input

checks.name: no_expected_theme_dependency_check
checks.message: expected_theme 未出现在 pipeline 输出中

checks.name: unknown_business_opportunity_check

checks.name: unknown_ratio_check
checks.message: seg-unknown 占比 1% (1/124)，在合理范围内

checks.name: noise_business_opportunity_check

checks.name: positive_business_opportunity_check

checks.name: evidence_trace_check

checks.name: segment_analysis_json_check

checks.name: empty_section_check
checks.message: 所有必要章节内容完整

checks.name: placeholder_check
checks.message: 未发现占位符

checks.message: Raw input 不是旧结构化格式

checks.name: ecommerce_feedback_count_vs_mention_count_check

checks.message: 所有 6 个业务 segment 均有完整的 analysis.json 和 analysis.md

checks.name: unsupported_metric_value_check
checks.message: 报告中未发现无基线支撑的具体目标值

checks.name: overall_markdown_json_consistency_check
checks.message: overall.analysis.md 与 overall.analysis.json 数据一致

checks.name: segment_markdown_json_consistency_check
checks.message: 所有 segment 的 Markdown 与 JSON 完全一致

checks.name: evidence_count_check
checks.message: 所有 issue_cluster 的 feedback_count 与 evidence_feedback_ids.length 一致

checks.name: duplicate_feedback_assignment_check
checks.message: 所有 feedback_id 仅属于一个 primary segment

checks.name: missing_segment_json_check
checks.message: 所有 9 个 segment MD 均有对应的 analysis.json

checks.name: global_cluster_id_check
checks.message: 所有 27 个 cluster_id 全局唯一

checks.name: duplicate_cluster_name_check
checks.message: 同一 segment 内无重复或高度相似的 cluster 名称

checks.name: strong_claim_without_evidence_check
checks.message: 报告中未发现缺乏数据支撑的强断言

checks.name: overall_business_issue_count_check
checks.message: overall 区分总聚类 27、业务 24、非业务 3

checks.name: report_structure_check
checks.message: 所有业务 segment MD 包含完整的报告结构

checks.name: evidence_trace_file_check
checks.message: evidence 追溯链路完整: raw → normalized → segment json → evidence_feedback_ids

checks.name: duplicate_cluster_boundary_check
checks.message: 同一 segment 内 cluster 之间无证据重叠

checks.name: overall_risk_quality_check
checks.message: overall 风险提醒内容有业务针对性

checks.name: further_validation_question_quality_check
checks.message: 进一步验证问题具体、可操作

checks.name: top_n_explanation_check
checks.message: 所有业务 segment 的高频问题章节有明确说明

checks.name: overall_summary_completeness_check

checks.name: overall_segment_score_consistency_check

checks.name: cluster_name_consistency_check
checks.message: 所有 cluster name 在 JSON 和 MD 中完全一致

checks.name: global_priority_ranking_check
checks.message: 全局 Top 3 排名合理，无低证据问题占据高位

checks.name: top_n_less_than_3_check
checks.message: 聚类数 < 3 时未使用 Top 3 表述
